title: Carved Wood
description: Adds new sets of wooden blocks and new variants of existing wooden blocks!
body:
![Carved Wood Logo](https://imgur.com/jlqnjMY.png) [![discord](https://i.imgur.com/zpKwRpZ.png)](https://discord.gg/t9csvzqSYb) [![Twitter/X](https://i.imgur.com/pGJbNvS.png)](https://X.com/I_AmMaker) [![Patreon](https://i.imgur.com/sA2zMrl.png)](https://www.patreon.com/makers_mods)
--- # **New Blocks:** - *Carved Planks* - *Planks Pillar* - *Smooth Wooden Boards* - *Wooden Boards* - *Wooden Panels* - *Wooden Lantern* - *Large Wooden Lantern* - *Wooden Tiles* - *Wooden Mosaic* - *Log Bundle* # **Block Variants:** - *Crafting Tables* - *Crafters* - *Ladders* - *Chests* - *Barrels* - *Campfires* - *Bookshelves* - *Chiseled Bookshelves* - *Lectern* - *Beehives* ---
